# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

type: s3
settings:
  bucket: your-elasticsearch-backup-bucket
  region: your-aws-region
  role_arn: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/ElasticsearchSnapshotRole
  base_path: elasticsearch-snapshots/production-cluster
  compress: true
  server_side_encryption: true

---
type: fs
settings:
  location: /mnt/elasticsearch_snapshots
  compress: true
  max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 40mb
  max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 40mb

---
indices:
  - '*'
ignore_unavailable: true
include_global_state: true
partial: false
metadata:
  taken_by: automated-system
  reason: daily-scheduled-backup
wait_for_completion: false

---
indices:
  - '*'
ignore_unavailable: true
include_global_state: true
partial: false
rename_pattern: (.+)
rename_replacement: restored_$1
include_aliases: true
wait_for_completion: true
ignore_index_settings:
  - index.routing.allocation.require._name
  - index.routing.allocation.exclude._name
  - index.routing.allocation.total_shards_per_node
  - index.auto_expand_replicas
